headline: The economy has a Strait of Hormuz deadline for Trump: Two weeks
summary: Corporate executives are not panicking over a short-term increase in oil prices and Strait of Hormuz closure, but patience may wear thin in a matter of weeks.

raw.headline: The economy has a Strait of Hormuz deadline for Trump: Two weeks
raw.summary: Corporate executives are not panicking over a short-term increase in oil prices and Strait of Hormuz closure, but patience may wear thin in a matter of weeks.

headline: U.K. confirms Iran fired two missiles at British-American base in Indian Ocean which failed to reach their target
summary: Iran fired the two missiles at the joint U.S.-U.K. Diego Garcia base in the Indian Ocean but they failed to reach their target, U.K. minister says.

raw.headline: U.K. confirms Iran fired two missiles at British-American base in Indian Ocean which failed to reach their target
